description: Icon array of 100 person figures in a 10-by-10 grid representing North Carolina's 2025 graduation cohort: 88 teal figures for students who graduate within four years (87.8 percent rate) and 12 grey figures for those who do not.

title.text: Of every 100 NC students, 88 graduate within four years
title.subtitle: An icon array makes a rate tangible: one figure = one student of a representative 100 (2025 cohort graduation rate, 87.8%).

usermeta.source: Source: NCDPI public accountability data (4-year cohort graduation rate), 2025. Style-guide demo.
